name: Born to Kill
description: Born to Kill was a New York City-based street gang composed of first-generation Vietnamese immigrants, founded in 1988 by Tho Hoang "David" Thai. Active primarily in the 1980s and early 1990s, the gang engaged in drug trafficking, counterfeiting, extortion, and murder. Its main base of operations was Canal Street in Manhattan's Chinatown. The gang was largely dismantled by 1992 following arrests and prosecutions of its members.
